[TITLE]: About - Op. Dr. Mahmut Uzut
[METADATA/INTRO]: Who is Op. Dr. Mahmut Uzut? Education and Expertise...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Who is Op. Dr. Mahmut Uzut? 
 Op. Dr. Mahmut UZUT is a highly skilled surgeon specializing in nose and facial aesthetic surgery with extensive experience in the field of facial plastic surgery. Dr. Mahmut Uzut graduated from the Faculty of Medicine at Dokuz Eylul University in 2007. After completing his medical education, he pursued his specialty training at Haseki Training and Research Hospital in Istanbul, focusing on ear, nose, and throat (ENT) surgery. During this period, he gained significant experience and expertise in both cosmetic and reconstructive surgery. Dr. Uzut has served in various health institutions, providing high-quality care to his patients.

[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Dr. Kelly has years of experience working with Michgain’s transplant surgery team and working in the Los Angeles County Hospital trauma center. He is more than qualified to deal with any circumstances that may arise during surgery. He has successfully completed over 12,000 bariatric surgeries as the head surgeon and has changed the lives of his patients.
